summary_reason: 2 of 3 checks pass (pre_registration PASS, mechanism_named PASS, axis_not_recently_failed CONDITIONAL). Hypothesis pre-dates plan. Mechanism named: 'MECHANISM: The MeanReversionOscillatorEngine fires when price is at Bollinger Band extreme + RSI extreme + price crosses back inside the band.' Axis combo [rsiOversoldMax, stopAtrBuffer, minRewardRiskRatio] was used on BBR BTC 1h and produced NO_EDGE (PF=0.13-0.23). While ETH is a different instrument and the STRATEGY_OUTCOME doesn't have axis_names in structured_data (so mechanical gate doesn't fire), qualitative judgement: researcher is explicitly citing the BTC result as context. This is not p-hacking — the BBR ETH 1h has never been tested with the correct archetype. CONDITIONAL_APPROVAL: researcher should acknowledge that if ETH also shows PF < 0.5, the BBR archetype is dead. Proceed — this test is per ARCHETYPE_EXHAUSTION protocol.

findings.finding: HYPOTHESIS 71aabe12-70d5-45a1-98ba-338b3006a765 predates plan RESEARCH_PLAN_2026-05-07m.md. Hypothesis created 2026-05-07T07:28:54. Pre-registration confirmed.

Mechanism marker 'mechanism' found. Content states: 'MECHANISM: The MeanReversionOscillatorEngine fires when price is at Bollinger Band extreme + RSI extreme + price crosses back inside the band. On ETH 1h, ETH's higher beta means Bollinger Band extremes represent larger absolute moves.' Causal story present for why ETH may differ from BTC.

Axis combo [rsiOversoldMax, stopAtrBuffer, minRewardRiskRatio] was used in BBR BTC 1h null-screen (ANTI_PATTERN at 2026-05-07T06:22:31) and produced NO_EDGE (PF=0.13-0.23). The prior STRATEGY_OUTCOME (c038afbc-like) for BBR BTC 1h does not have axis_names in structured_data, so the mechanical discard gate would not fire. However, the same axis set on BTC was deeply negative. ETH is a different instrument (higher beta, more retail participation) and the BBR ETH 1h has never been properly tested. Proceeding per ARCHETYPE_EXHAUSTION protocol — this is the least-recently-tested non-broken path. Researcher should note: if ETH shows similar PF to BTC (< 0.3), BBR is dead.
